name: Yoni Digital Garden
summary: A living resume and research system powered by Notion, Astro, and GitHub Actions.
highlights: Automated content sync from Notion to Markdown
Structured content model for goals, projects, and learning

name: Notion Sync Pipeline
summary: A content ingestion pipeline that fetches Notion pages, converts blocks to Markdown, and publishes them through Astro.
highlights: Automated page ingestion from Notion database
Markdown generation with frontmatter for typed collections
CI integration that keeps content current on deploy

name: Pokerly
summary: A CS project focused on game logic and software engineering fundamentals.
